notes: decay data from NUBASE2020 (outside ICRP-107 set); some branchings may be partial; decay modes/branching/daughters from NUBASE2020 (via mendeleev); decayEnergy_MeV are total Q-values from AME2020 atomic masses; specificActivity computed from half-life and atomic mass; decayHeat is an estimate (recoverable energy: alpha=Q, beta-~Q/3, beta+ adds annihilation, EC~5%, SF~185 MeV; neutrino loss not fully modeled); superheavy nuclide: half-life and branchings have large experimental uncertainty (few-atom statistics); atomic mass is partly AME2020 extrapolation, so computed decayEnergy/Q-values are estimates

decay data from NUBASE2020 (outside ICRP-107 set); some branchings may be partial; source branchings summed to 114%; normalized to 100% (uncertain/superheavy data); undergoes spontaneous fission (88.1057% branch), emitting fast neutrons (~185 MeV recoverable per fission, included in decayHeat); decay modes/branching/daughters from NUBASE2020 (via mendeleev); decayEnergy_MeV are total Q-values from AME2020 atomic masses; specificActivity computed from half-life and atomic mass; decayHeat is an estimate (recoverable energy: alpha=Q, beta-~Q/3, beta+ adds annihilation, EC~5%, SF~185 MeV; neutrino loss not fully modeled); superheavy nuclide: half-life and branchings have large experimental uncertainty (few-atom statistics); atomic mass is partly AME2020 extrapolation, so computed decayEnergy/Q-values are estimates
